messages.content: What is the weather in Boston, MA? Use the provided tool.

messages.reasoning_content: The user is asking for the weather in Boston, MA and specifically asks to use the provided tool. I have access to the getCurrentWeather function which takes a location parameter. I should call this function with "Boston, MA" as the location.

function.name: getCurrentWeather
function.description: Get the current weather conditions for a given city.

location.description: The city and optional state, e.g. 'Boston, MA'.
